betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Titanium Alloy Processing§f quest covers the §6tier-2 alloy production§f chain in AR — §6Titanium Iridium Alloy§f (used for fuel tanks and high-stress rocket components) and §6Titanium Aluminide§f (used for nuclear rocket motors and high-temperature parts). Both alloys are produced in the §6Electric Arc Furnace§f (10004).

§6Production Path (ingottitaniumiridium.json + ingottitaniumaluminide.json)§f:
- §6Titanium Iridium Alloy Ingot§f (advancedrocketry:productplate:1, ingotTitaniumIridium):
  - Machine: §6Electric Arc Furnace§f (10004) at 3000 ticks
  - Input: 1x §6ingotIridium§f, 1x §6ingotTitanium§f
  - Output: 2x §6ingotTitaniumIridium§f
  - Energy: 20 RF/t
- §6Titanium Aluminide Ingot§f (ingotTitaniumAluminide):
  - Machine: §6Electric Arc Furnace§f (10004) at 9000 ticks
  - Input: 7x §6ingotAluminum§f, 3x §6ingotTitanium§f
  - Output: 3x §6ingotTitaniumAluminide§f
  - Energy: 20 RF/t

The titanium iridium alloy is the §6fuel tank material§f for the §6Bipropellant Fuel Tank§f (chain) and the §6Monopropellant Fuel Tank§f (10027, see advancedRocketryTweaks.zs:81). The titanium aluminide is the §6nuclear motor material§f for the §6Nuclear Thermal Rocket Engine§f (10029) and the §6Fusion Reactor Hull§f (chain).

This quest is a prerequisite for the §6Bipropellant Rocket Motor§f (chain), the §6Nuclear Thermal Rocket Engine§f (10029), and the §6Space Elevator§f (10067). It is the §6transition point§f between mid-game (steel/iron) and late-game (titanium alloys) rocket construction.

§eTip§f: Stockpile §6Iridium§f (from §6HBM's NTM mod§f) before starting — the alloy recipes consume the iridium faster than the EAF can smelt it. The §6Titanium Aluminide§f recipe needs a 7:3 aluminum-to-titanium ratio, so plan your stockpiles accordingly.
